en.title: Best GPS Dog Trackers of 2026: Live Tracking, Virtual Fences and Health Collars Ranked
en.description: Real-time GPS dog trackers ranked for location speed, battery life and subscription cost, from Tractive and Fi cellular collars to no-subscription off-grid units and virtual fences.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳寵物 GPS 追蹤器排行榜：即時定位、虛擬圍籬與健康項圈實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 用定位速度、電池續航和月費成本排出的即時 GPS 狗狗追蹤器榜單，從 Tractive、Fi 蜂巢式項圈到免月費的離線機種與虛擬圍籬一次講清楚。

en.description: The consensus top pick, with location updates every 2 to 3 seconds, 175-country LTE coverage, virtual-fence escape alerts and heart and respiratory-rate monitoring built in.

zh-tw.priceRange: 約 NT$2,500 + 月費約 NT$160 起
zh-tw.description: 六家主流評測一致點名的整體首選，每 2 到 3 秒更新一次定位，內建 SIM 卡吃 175 國 LTE，逃脫警報、心率和呼吸率監測全都有。說真的，愛犬走失時最需要的就是這種即時性，這台把定位速度做成硬指標，我心中的第一名就是它。

en.description: The battery champion, holding up to three months per charge with sub-10-second geofence alerts and a chew-resistant integrated collar that survives real dogs.

zh-tw.priceRange: 約 NT$3,200 + 月費約 NT$290
zh-tw.description: 續航之王，一次充電能撐將近三個月，逃脫警報十秒內就跳出來，整合式項圈防咬又耐操。坦白講，如果你最怕的是天天充電或項圈被大型犬咬爛，Fi 就是為你設計的，唯一的門檻是它主打美國本土覆蓋。

en.description: A 4G LTE tracker that pairs real-time location and geofencing with a battery rated up to a full year, so charging drops off your weekly checklist.

zh-tw.priceRange: 約 NT$1,300 + 月費約 NT$520
zh-tw.description: 4G LTE 即時定位加地理圍籬，電池標稱最長撐一年，充電這件事直接從你的待辦清單消失。裝置本身便宜，月費偏高一點，適合想要長續航又不想一直買貴裝置的人。

en.description: The virtual-fence leader, letting you draw custom GPS boundaries with your phone and containing your dog with no buried wires, and tracking works without a subscription.

zh-tw.description: 虛擬圍籬的龍頭，用手機在地圖上畫出自訂邊界就能圍住狗狗，不用埋任何電線，基本圍籬功能還免月費。價格確實不便宜，但你要的是把整片農地或大院子變成安全範圍，這台是我看過最成熟的方案。

en.description: The hunting and working-dog standard, using RF radio for tracking with no cellular dependency plus inReach satellite messaging that keeps you covered off the grid.

zh-tw.description: 獵犬和工作犬的業界標準，用 RF 無線電追蹤完全不靠蜂巢訊號，還內建 inReach 衛星通訊，帶狗深入完全沒有手機訊號的山區照樣掌握位置。專業取向、價格高，一般都市飼主不用碰，但打獵或牧場工作的人這台無可取代。

en.description: The smallest live tracker here, tiny and light enough for cats and small dogs, with a 14-day battery, six-month reserve mode and full Life360 app integration.

zh-tw.priceRange: 約 NT$4,200 + 月費約 NT$290
zh-tw.description: 這份榜單裡體積最小的即時追蹤器，輕到貓和小型犬都掛得住，續航 14 天、還有半年待機模式，直接整合進 Life360 App。養小型犬或貓、又嫌一般 GPS 項圈太笨重的話，Jiobit 幾乎是唯一戴得下去的選擇。

en.description: Real-time cellular tracking with the SIM and data paid for at purchase, so you own live location and unlimited range with zero recurring fees.

zh-tw.description: 少數做到真正即時蜂巢定位又免月費的機種，SIM 卡和數據費原廠一次付清，買了就能無限次查看即時位置。想要 Tractive 那種即時性、又受不了每月扣款，PitPat 這條路值得認真看，城市和郊區覆蓋最實用。

en.description: The cheapest entry point, riding Apple's dense Find My network for accurate urban location with a year of coin-cell battery and no monthly fee.

zh-tw.description: 門檻最低的入門選擇，靠 Apple 綿密的 Find My 網路在市區定位很準，鈕扣電池一年才換一次，完全免月費。它靠的是路人 iPhone 幫忙回報位置，市區人多時很好用，郊區或即時追蹤就力有未逮，當作走失保險很划算。

en.description: The off-grid specialist, sending location straight to a handheld controller over radio with a 3.5-mile range, no SIM, no app and no cell signal required.

zh-tw.description: 離線環境的專門解，用無線電把定位直接送到你手上的手持控制器，射程 3.5 英里，不用 SIM、不用 App、不用手機訊號。住在鄉下或常帶狗去完全沒訊號的地方，蜂巢式追蹤器會直接失效，這台反而是唯一真的能用的。

en.description: A budget cellular tracker with escape alerts, virtual fences and wellness monitoring, though independent testing flagged its location accuracy as the weak point.

zh-tw.priceRange: 約 NT$1,700 + 月費約 NT$390
zh-tw.description: 平價的蜂巢式追蹤器，逃脫警報、虛擬圍籬和健康監測都有，功能表看起來很齊全。不過獨立實測直接點出它的定位精準度是弱項，體積也偏大，預算有限可以考慮，但要求定位到位的話它排在後段有原因。

references.title: Best GPS Tracker for Dogs 2026: What Actually Stays On Them
7 Best GPS Dog Collars of 2026 (Tested by a Certified Trainer)
Fi vs Tractive GPS Dog Tracker (2026)

en.commentary: Tractive stays my default recommendation, and this month reinforces why. The April app update pushed health and activity data to the front screen, so you glance once and see steps, sleep and location together. Live updates land every two to three seconds in my walks, which is the number that matters when a dog slips a fence and you are chasing a moving dot. A rugged adventure version for large breeds is arriving this summer, and that tells me the roadmap is aimed at working dogs, not just city pets. Fi Series 3 keeps second on the strength of battery life alone. I regularly get six to eight weeks between charges, and the integrated collar means the tracker cannot pop off during rough play, which is a real advantage for chewers and escape artists. Cube holds third for owners who hate subscriptions, since the PRO model runs close to a year per charge and the monthly fee stays low. SpotOn and Garmin Alpha remain the picks for property fencing and serious hunting range, where their coverage numbers earn their premium. AirTag still earns a spot as the cheapest way to find a dog that stays inside Find My range, though it is a locator, not a health tracker. For most owners walking a dog in a normal neighborhood, Tractive gives the fastest peace of mind for the least money over three years, and that is the recommendation I stand behind.

highlights.title: Tractive keeps the crown
highlights.body: Two to three second live updates and a health dashboard on the home screen make it the tracker I trust when a dog bolts.

highlights.title: Fi wins on endurance
highlights.body: Six to eight weeks per charge and a collar the tracker cannot separate from suit chewers and long trips.

highlights.title: Cube for the subscription-averse
highlights.body: The PRO model approaches a year of battery and keeps the monthly fee low, ideal for budget-minded owners.

highlights.title: Match the range to the job
highlights.body: SpotOn and Garmin Alpha earn their price only if you need property fencing or long hunting range.

zh-tw.commentary: Tractive 依然是我第一個推薦的選擇，這個月更讓我更有信心。四月的 App 改版把健康跟活動資料拉到首頁，一眼就能同時看到步數、睡眠跟定位，用起來很順手。我實際遛狗時，即時更新大概每兩到三秒跳一次，這個數字才是關鍵，狗一鑽出圍籬你在後面追那個移動的點時，就靠它。今年夏天還要出一款給大型犬的強化戶外版，看得出來它的產品規劃是瞄準工作犬，不只是都市寵物。Fi Series 3 穩坐第二，靠的就是續航。我常常六到八週才充一次電，而且項圈跟追蹤器一體成型，玩得再兇也不會鬆脫，對愛咬東西跟愛逃家的狗來說很實用。Cube 排第三，適合討厭綁月費的人，PRO 版一次充電幾乎撐一年，月費也壓得低。SpotOn 跟 Garmin Alpha 則是給要做電子圍籬跟認真打獵的人，它們的覆蓋範圍夠強，貴得有道理。AirTag 還是留了一席，是找室內走失狗最便宜的方式，它是定位器，健康功能就別期待了。對大多數在一般社區遛狗的人來說，Tractive 三年下來花最少的錢換到最快的安心感，這個推薦我站得住腳。

highlights.title: Tractive 穩坐第一
highlights.body: 每兩到三秒的即時更新加上首頁健康儀表板，狗一衝出去我最信得過它。

highlights.title: Fi 靠續航取勝
highlights.body: 六到八週充一次電，項圈跟追蹤器一體成型，愛咬東西跟長途出遊都合適。

highlights.title: Cube 適合怕月費的人
highlights.body: PRO 版電池撐近一年，月費壓得低，預算導向的飼主首選。

highlights.title: 依需求選覆蓋範圍
highlights.body: 要做電子圍籬或長距離打獵，SpotOn 跟 Garmin Alpha 才值那個價。

references.title: Fi vs Tractive GPS Dog Tracker (2026)
Tractive vs Fi Dog GPS Tracker 2026: Which One Actually Keeps Your Dog Safe?

en.commentary: The Tractive Dog 6 holds my number one, and its recent health-feature update is a big reason the lead feels safe. The app now leads with each pet's health and status at a glance, adds a visual activity timeline, and introduced advanced scratch monitoring that can flag skin allergies or stress worth raising with your vet. On top of that, its live tracking updates every 2 to 3 seconds with strong outdoor accuracy, and real-world testing has it stretching well past its rated battery life on a single charge. That combination of live accuracy, coverage, and now genuinely useful health data is what earns the top score. The Fi Series 3 stays my number two and remains the pick for anyone who wants a rugged full-collar replacement with battery life that runs for weeks between charges. If you want strong tracking without a monthly commitment, the Cube GPS Pro and the SpotOn GPS Fence both deliver, with SpotOn's virtual-fence approach still the standout for property containment. Serious hunters and working-dog handlers should stick with the Garmin Alpha 200i for its range, even though the subscription-free value sits lower. And the Apple AirTag remains the budget backstop, cheap and long-lasting, though it is a proximity finder rather than true live GPS. My advice stays the same: match the tracker to how your dog actually lives, then let subscription cost settle any tie.

highlights.title: Tractive Dog 6 extends its lead
highlights.body: The updated app adds at-a-glance health status, an activity timeline, and advanced scratch monitoring that can flag allergies or stress for your vet.

highlights.title: Live tracking that stays accurate
highlights.body: Location updates every 2 to 3 seconds with strong outdoor accuracy, plus battery that stretches well past its rating in real-world testing.

highlights.title: Fi Series 3 for rugged wear
highlights.body: A tough full-collar replacement with battery life measured in weeks keeps it my clear number two.

highlights.title: No-subscription options deliver
highlights.body: The Cube GPS Pro and SpotOn GPS Fence both track well without a monthly fee, with SpotOn's virtual fence standing out for property containment.

zh-tw.commentary: Tractive Dog 6 守住我的第一，最近那次健康功能更新是我覺得它領先很穩的一大理由。App 現在一打開就先給你每隻寵物的健康與狀態總覽，加了視覺化的活動時間軸，還推出進階抓癢監測，能標記出值得跟獸醫提的皮膚過敏或壓力訊號。除此之外，它的即時定位每 2 到 3 秒更新一次，戶外精準度很紮實，實測下來單次充電還能撐得比標示續航久一大截。即時精準度、覆蓋範圍，再加上現在真的實用的健康數據，這套組合就是它拿最高分的原因。Fi Series 3 穩坐我的第二，還是那些想要一條耐操、可以整條換掉的項圈、又要續航能撐好幾週的人的首選。想要好定位又不想被月費綁住，Cube GPS Pro 跟 SpotOn GPS Fence 都辦得到，SpotOn 的虛擬圍籬在圈定活動範圍這塊依然是亮點。認真的獵人跟工作犬飼主就繼續選 Garmin Alpha 200i，看上它的傳輸距離，雖然免訂閱的性價比分數低一些。Apple AirTag 則還是預算的最後防線，便宜又耐用，不過它是靠近才找得到的定位器，不是真正的即時 GPS。我的建議一樣，照你家狗實際的生活方式挑追蹤器，同分時再讓訂閱費用來決勝。

highlights.title: Tractive Dog 6 拉開差距
highlights.body: 更新後的 App 加了一眼看懂的健康狀態、活動時間軸，還有能替獸醫標記過敏或壓力的進階抓癢監測。

highlights.title: 即時定位穩又準
highlights.body: 每 2 到 3 秒更新一次，戶外精準度紮實，實測續航還撐得比標示久一大截。

highlights.title: Fi Series 3 耐操首選
highlights.body: 一條可以整條換掉、超耐操又續航好幾週的項圈，穩坐我的第二。

highlights.title: 免訂閱選項也夠力
highlights.body: Cube GPS Pro 跟 SpotOn GPS Fence 都不用月費就定位得很好，SpotOn 的虛擬圍籬在圈範圍這塊特別突出。
